mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate reduce corporate borrowing costs and lower equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over rolling 3-year windows or forward returns are negative in greater than 55 percent of declining rate periods.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate exceeding 6.0 percent signals deteriorating labor market conditions and reduced consumer spending capacity, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in greater than 60 percent of instances where UNRATE crosses above the 6.0 percent threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in retail sales and housing starts indicate synchronized consumer and business demand expansion, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive changes in RSAFS and HOUST fail to predict positive 60-day returns with a statistically significant coefficient in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production during a post-recession recovery phase reflects strengthening manufacturing output and capacity utilization, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: The positive relationship between INDPRO growth and 5-day returns reverses or becomes statistically insignificant during post-recession recovery periods.

mechanism_narrative: Rapid inflation spikes measured by CPIAUCSL erode real corporate margins and force monetary tightening expectations, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in greater than 50 percent of periods where CPIAUCSL exceeds the 0.4 percent monthly threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained nonfarm payroll additions above 250 thousand signal robust economic growth and rising corporate earnings expectations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Rank IC for PAYEMS exceeding the 250 thousand threshold remains below 0.01 over rolling 5-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Low federal funds rates combined with rising industrial production indicate accommodative monetary policy supporting real economic activity, yielding positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The interaction term between FEDFUNDS and INDPRO shows no predictive power for 20-day returns in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Declining retail sales alongside rising unemployment indicate weakening consumer demand and economic contraction, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Negative 5-day returns do not occur in greater than 55 percent of periods where RSAFS declines and UNRATE rises simultaneously.
